changelog:
WhatsApp:
- Human-like sending (marks seen + 'typing…') to avoid spam blocks.
- Automated messages now arrive as a polished receipt IMAGE with your shop logo (print-ready, payment, credit reminder/settlement).
- Unread green light on customer cards; Auto Speed-Up on a schedule.

Coverage-based pricing (new):
- Price by actual ink coverage. Separate B&W / Colour models you train with sample files.

Selection & files:
- New shortcuts (Ctrl+A today, Ctrl+Shift+A all, Alt+A, Ctrl+I invert, Shift+Delete force-delete), Force Select mode, collapsible POS products group.

Reliability:
- Fixed WhatsApp media not downloading / downloading twice / 'missing' after restart.
- Files log capped to 2 days; stock adjustments fixed; better update check; live print progress.

Note: this is a required update.

tips.title: What’s New
tips.body: Right-click any image and choose Crop Image to trim it before printing.

tips.title: Tip
tips.body: Add your papers in Settings -> Pricing to track material stock automatically.
